description_long: This ornate armchair features a highly decorative, carved wooden frame fully upholstered in a vibrant floral fabric. The backrest is open and intricately shaped, with symmetrical scrollwork and a central motif, giving it a baroque or rococo appearance. The seat is generously padded and covered in the same colorful floral upholstery, which extends seamlessly over the legs and backrest. The legs are cabriole-style, curving outward and inward with elegant flourishes, and are also upholstered, blending into the overall design. The armchair lacks traditional armrests, instead presenting a continuous, flowing silhouette from the seat to the backrest. The upholstery pattern is dense and multicolored, dominated by reds, pinks, greens, and blues on a light background, creating a striking and luxurious visual effect.
description: An ornate, fully upholstered armchair with a carved, openwork backrest and cabriole legs, covered in a vibrant floral fabric. The design is baroque-inspired, with no armrests and a seamless, colorful appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the elaborate openwork backrest, padded seat, and cabriole legs, all covered in floral upholstery.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the curved profile of the backrest and legs, and the thickness of the padded seat.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the symmetrical scrollwork of the backrest and the continuous upholstery over the back and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the flowing curves of the frame and the plush seat.
attribute_backrest_style: medium-height, openwork, ornate carved with central motif and scrollwork
